title: Erika Kirk faces fresh backlash as Ashley St Clair questions Druski skit reaction after Charlie Kirk show clip
summary_full: Ashley St. Clair reacted to Erika Kirk’s comments about Druski’s skit, questioning her response and advising her to step back from public pressure. The discussion began after Erika spoke on The Charlie Kirk Show and explained her frustration with media coverage and her appearance at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, which added more attention to the ongoing debate.
